name: Project Chimaera
description:
❗❗READ FOR FUNCTIONS❗❗

Chimaera. No one knows where he's from, or even what he is. He? It? You can't really tell... But then again, you're charged with interrogation of this being. Good place to ask, no? And if you're lucky, they won't have to find a replacement for you... Perhaps.

Goal: Don't get torn apart. Find out as much as you can about the being.

Hint: Don't ignore him <3

3 possible endings to your interrogation. You can stop at any point.

Say 'Goodbye' in your message to end the interrogation.

Greet the character to start a new one.

YOU CAN'T START A NEW INTERROGATION UNTIL YOU END THE PREVIOUS ONE!

To start anew, start a new chat.

Please give some feedback on the bot, as it will help me make better bots in the future!
Though there are dislikes I won't accept as criticism. Such as:
That one person that dislikes all mlm bots. You know who you are.
"I wanna be different 🥰" - obvious reasons
Dislikes without any context and explanation
"Bot repeats what I say and talks for me" - I did try to limit this in the personality of the bot, but unfortunately it's a thing the AI does, not the bot :( I recommend editing the messages a few times and it should stop.
creator: Vickythevillain
